basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Post-Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 35 years who have B.E. in Civil/Mechanical/Naval Architecture/Ship Building/Electrical/Applied Mechanics/Aerospace, M.Tech. in Structures/Renewable Energy/Offshore Structures/Coastal Structures/Maritime Logistics, and Ph.D. in Civil/Structural/Naval Architecture and Ship Build

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.details: Post-Doctoral Fellow: B.E. in Civil/Mechanical/Naval Architecture/Ship Building/Electrical/Applied Mechanics/Aerospace. M.Tech. in Structures/Renewable Energy/Offshore Structures/Coastal Structures/Maritime Logistics. Ph.D. in Civil/Structural/Naval Architecture and Ship Building/Ocean Engineering/Offshore Structures. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards. Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in Class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Post-Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E. degree in relevant fields, an M.Tech. degree in specified specializations, or a Ph.D. in Civil, Structural, Naval Architecture, or Ocean Engineering. Minimum academic percentages are also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 84,000.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Post-Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual job type.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While the maximum age limit is 35 years, age relaxation for reserved categories is usually provided as per government norms. Please refer to the official notification for specific details.
